prompt: Show the distribution of final grades across all courses

inputData.question: Show the distribution of final grades across all courses

response.bodyRaw: {"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the distribution of final grades across all courses"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the distribution of final grades across all courses"},"startedAt":1771855294322,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see the distribution of final grades across all courses. The grades table contains grade_value (a custom enum type) and is linked to enrollments, which link to course_sections, which link to courses. To show the distribution, I need to count how many students received each grade value for each course, or overall. I'll group by course and grade_value to show the distribution across courses.","sql":"SELECT c.code AS course_code, c.name AS course_name, g.grade_value AS final_grade, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name, g.grade_value ORDER BY c.code, g.grade_value","assumptions":["grade_value represents the final grade for a course","Each enrollment has at most one grade record (enforced by unique index on enrollment_id)","Only grades with non-null grade_value are included in the distribution"]},"endedAt":1771855305988},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT c.code AS course_code, c.name AS cs.course_id = c.id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name, g.grade_value ORDER BY c.code, visualization.title: Distribution of Final Grades Across All Courses

resultRaw.sql: SELECT c.code AS course_code, c.name AS course_name, g.grade_value AS final_grade, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM grades g JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name, g.grade_value ORDER BY c.code, g.grade_value
